About Us

Enigma is the Computer Science club at Mahindra University, dedicated to fostering a passion for technology and innovation among students. Established in 2017, it is also the university's oldest continuously running student community. The club provides a platform for tech enthusiasts to explore areas like programming, cybersecurity, AI, and more. Through hands-on workshops, hackathons, coding competitions, and expert talks, Enigma helps students develop problem-solving skills and stay up-to-date with cutting-edge technologies.

1.5k+
Discord Users

PRs merged on GitHub

Workshops conducted
20+
Projects completed
What We Do

Here's what to look for when you join Enigma or attend an event

Events

We organize hackathons and workshops throughout the year, as well as socials for networking.

Sub-committees

Enigma has several subcommittees, for Systems, WebDev, GameDev, AI/ML, Comp Coding and more.

Collaborations

We partner with other clubs and companies to bring bigger events and opportunities to members.

Prizes

Hackathons and competitions throughout the year come with prizes, goodies and recognition.
